title: connector.sync_job_list

size.description: Specifies a max number of results to get

status.description: A sync job status to fetch connector sync jobs for

connector_id.description: A connector id to fetch connector sync jobs for

job_type.description: A comma-separated list of job types to fetch the sync jobs for

description:
Get all connector sync jobs.

Get information about all stored connector sync jobs listed by their creation date in ascending order.
